title: Kettlephant & Twitter!
description: An addon that adds Kettlephant & Twitter!
body:
This addon adds Kettlephant and Twitter! ,

Update

*Added evolution for Kettlephant ,
*Phantea is here! ,
*To evolve Kettlephant you must give it a Chipped Pot and lvl it up to lvl. 37 to evolve into Phantea.


Suggestion

*You need to download the latest version (fixed bugs and crashes) and do not download the old versions.,
*Must put in the resource pack folder and the data pack folder for it to work.,
*And also, Enjoy!
